---
title: 读到的好文章
description: "我在其他博客、个人网站和文章里读到的好内容。它们不是时间线，也不是站内文章，而是这个花园的外部养分。"
page-layout: full
toc: true
body-class: reading-collection-page
author: ""
listing:
  id: reading-links
  contents: ./starred-articles.yaml
  template: ./starred-articles.ejs.md
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
draft: false
---

::: {.reading-intro}
这里收集我读到、筛过、愿意推荐给后来自己的外部文章。添加新内容时，只需要维护同目录下的 `starred-articles.yaml`：选择一个分类，把文章标题、链接、来源和一句话说明补进去。
:::

:::{#reading-links}
:::

<script>
(() => {
  const desktopQuery = window.matchMedia("(min-width: 992px)");
  const readingTocs = () => [...document.querySelectorAll(".reading-toc")];

  const updateReadingTocMetrics = () => {
    const sidebar = document.getElementById("quarto-margin-sidebar");
    const toc = sidebar?.querySelector(".reading-toc");

    if (!toc || !sidebar || !desktopQuery.matches || toc.parentElement !== sidebar) {
      document.documentElement.style.removeProperty("--reading-toc-left");
      document.documentElement.style.removeProperty("--reading-toc-width");
      return;
    }

    const rect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect();
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--reading-toc-left", `${rect.left}px`);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--reading-toc-width", `${rect.width}px`);
  };

  const moveReadingToc = () => {
    const listing = document.getElementById("listing-reading-links");
    const sidebar = document.getElementById("quarto-margin-sidebar");
    const toc = sidebar?.querySelector(".reading-toc") ||
      listing?.querySelector(".reading-toc") ||
      readingTocs()[0];

    if (!toc || !listing || !sidebar) {
      return;
    }

    if (desktopQuery.matches) {
      if (toc.parentElement !== sidebar) {
        sidebar.prepend(toc);
      }
      updateReadingTocMetrics();
      return;
    }

    if (toc.parentElement !== listing) {
      listing.prepend(toc);
    }
    updateReadingTocMetrics();
  };

  const updateReadingTocActiveLink = () => {
    const tocs = readingTocs();

    if (!tocs.length) {
      return;
    }

    const sections = [...document.querySelectorAll("#listing-reading-links section.level2[id]")];
    const links = tocs.flatMap((toc) => [...toc.querySelectorAll("a.no-external")]);
    const current = sections.reduce((active, section) => {
      const top = section.getBoundingClientRect().top;
      return top <= 130 ? section : active;
    }, sections[0]);

    links.forEach((link) => {
      const isActive = current && link.hash === `#${current.id}`;
      link.classList.toggle("active", Boolean(isActive));

      if (isActive) {
        link.setAttribute("aria-current", "true");
      } else {
        link.removeAttribute("aria-current");
      }
    });
  };

  const refreshReadingToc = () => {
    moveReadingToc();
    updateReadingTocActiveLink();
  };

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", refreshReadingToc);
  } else {
    refreshReadingToc();
  }

  window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(refreshReadingToc);
  }, { passive: true });

  window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(updateReadingTocActiveLink);
  }, { passive: true });

  window.addEventListener("hashchange", updateReadingTocActiveLink);
})();
</script>
